_comment: Synthetic fixtures (alert.json + ground_truth.yaml) live under fixtures/<id>/. fixture_dir is resolved relative to advisory_ab/. gold is the hand-labeled disposition. predicted_relevance is our prior on whether advisory would help; we measure whether the experiment confirms it.

positives.rationale: Apt-mirror from undocumented 172.22.0.42 — two competing explanations equally plausible. Discriminator beyond CMDB+IAM is wazuh-auth-pattern (cadence); advisory should surface it.

negatives.rationale: Exact replay of the recurring 172.22.0.10 + nagios pattern — CMDB+IAM resolves cleanly on loop 1. Advisory redundant; D's cost is the measurement.

_corpus_note: Test alerts are synthetic (net-new entity values), so they are not in the corpus. No exclusion needed — the corpus stays intact across runs.
